name: boundary contract bundle in noisy language
query: How do I separate interface guarantees, obligations, admission gates, and proof traces instead of bundling them together?

name: partial hunch becomes routed cue
query: How do I turn a vague signal into an explicit handoff instead of leaving it half-formed?

name: compare without crushing trade-offs into one score
query: How do I choose among options without flattening the trade space into one number?

name: keep idea search novel and diverse
query: How do I keep idea hunting wide instead of collapsing into the first decent answer?
